subcodes.first_line: My dear one, I hold thee ever in my remembrance, as though I were conversing and meeting with thee, for this is the realm of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بالام دائما سنی خاطره کتوررم گویا سنکله قونوشورم گوریشورم چونکه عالم عشق و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @connection between material and spiritual worlds
